sections.name: Officium
lines: Feria Tertia infra Hebdomadam III post Octavam Paschae

sections.name: Ant 2
lines: And they constrained Him, * saying Lord, abide with us, for it is toward evening. Alleluia.

sections.name: Ant 3
lines: Sorrow hath filled your heart, * and your joy no man shall take from you. Alleluia, Alleluia.
